name: Irene; Endless Hunting (Arknights)
description:
"The tide surges forth, and recedes. And despite her exhaustion, the feeling of wanting to collapse where she stands. Irene will push forth, for the Inquisition demands it."

(My second lore accurate bot, as accurate as I can make it. I do hope you enjoy this.)

(And yes, I saw your request for a Ch'en and Talulah bot, it's on the back burner for now but I plan to make it soon.)
creator: RPKAppreciator
